description: Build and deploy site to Cloudflare Pages after fixing retellCallId binding
Disable Vite sourcemap generation (build.sourcemap: false) to reduce build time

asi.hypothesis: Sourcemap generation adds non-trivial overhead to Vite production builds; disabling should reduce total build+deploy time
asi.next_action_hint: Separate build-only timing from deploy variance; next try should either (a) use direct ./node_modules/.bin/wrangler path to avoid npx startup overhead, or (b) optimize actual build time by reducing server-bundle size (heavy deps like three.js, reveal.js bloat worker bundle)
asi.rollback_reason: Total time increased to 21.7s vs baseline 13.9s. Deploy overhead dominated due to npx wrangler resolution and network variance. Build itself was similar speed (~6.3s server build). Sourcemap change did not meaningfully improve build time because Vite already defaults sourcemaps to false in production for client builds.

description: Disable Vite gzip size reporting (build.reportCompressedSize: false) and use local wrangler path to avoid npx overhead

asi.hypothesis: Gzip size computation and npx overhead add visible time to the build+deploy cycle
asi.next_action_hint: Need current baseline at HEAD because prior best (13.9s) was at older commit; try a new untouched baseline run. After establishing current best, try build optimizations like rollupOptions.manualChunks, lighter dependencies, or reducing server bundle size
asi.rollback_reason: Total time 19.6s still higher than historical best 13.9s; gzip reporting/npx were not the bottleneck. Build time is stable around 8.5s; deploy variance dominates

description: Establish baseline at current HEAD (93fd84a) for build+deploy time

asi.hypothesis: Current HEAD baseline is ~20s total (build ~8.5s + deploy ~12s); prior 13.9s best was at older commit with less code
asi.next_action_hint: Focus on server build time (~6.2s) which dominates. Investigate if heavy client-only deps (three.js, d3-geo, reveal.js) are being bundled into SSR build. Consider marking them as external in build.rollupOptions or using dynamic imports gated by browser checks.

description: Disable CSS code splitting (build.cssCodeSplit: false) to reduce output file count

asi.hypothesis: CSS code splitting creates many small CSS files, increasing file count and deploy overhead
asi.next_action_hint: Try bundling all external server deps with ssr.noExternal + wrangler --no-bundle to eliminate wrangler bundling step entirely; OR try reducing heavy external deps like @clerk/backend
asi.rollback_reason: Total time unchanged at ~20.9s. CSS files were still split (70 files uploaded). Build time not meaningfully affected by CSS code splitting.

description: Disable Rollup tree-shaking (rollupOptions.treeshake: false) to speed up build

asi.hypothesis: Disabling Rollup tree-shaking reduces build CPU time because Rollup skips side-effect analysis
asi.next_action_hint: Opposite experiment: try treeshake: 'smallest-side-effects' for smaller bundle and faster deploy; OR reduce bundle size by removing dead code/test routes; OR investigate if deploy time correlates with worker bundle size
asi.rollback_reason: Total time 23.4s worse than baseline 20.8s. Build was faster (client 1.69s, server 5.54s) but deploy slowed down significantly. Deploy time is sensitive to bundle size.

description: Remove /test/voice-agent route to reduce build module count

asi.hypothesis: Removing the /test/voice-agent route reduces module count and speeds up build+deploy
asi.next_action_hint: Build-only optimizations are hard to measure due to deploy variance (~±2s). Try bundling external deps during Vite build with ssr.noExternal to reduce wrangler bundling work; OR measure build-only time separately from deploy
asi.rollback_reason: Total time 20.6s vs baseline 20.8s — no meaningful difference. Build actually slightly slower (9.06s vs 8.6s), likely noise. Removing test route did not meaningfully reduce build or deploy time.
